design_vision: Notion meets HubSpot. A mature, B2B CRM dashboard for Skandiamäklarna. Zero fluff, strict data hierarchy, functional beauty. 95% monochrome with Skandiamäklarna Champagne/Gold used exclusively for key highlights, statuses, and primary actions to exude premium real estate authority.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-md (max 8px to keep it sharp and professional)
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat background, 1px solid #E5E5E5 border. On hover for interactive cards: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg transition-all duration-200

components.sidebar_navigation: Fixed left sidebar (Notion style), pure #FFFFFF background, 1px right border. Links are muted gray, active link has #0A0A0A text and subtle #CBA135 left border highlight.
components.kpi_cards: col-span-1. Top-left metric value in Manrope text-4xl tracking-tighter. Sparkline or trend indicator on bottom right.
components.kanban_board: Horizontal flex container with overflow-x-auto. Each column is w-80 or min-w-[320px], bg-[#F4F4F5] p-3 rounded-md. Cards inside are pure white with 1px border. Drag-and-drop implied visually.
components.interactive_map: Leaflet map taking col-span-2 or col-span-full. Grayscale/Light map tiles (CartoDB Positron) to maintain monochrome UI. 'White spots' (municipalities without offices) highlighted with #CBA135 circles or polygons.
components.ai_research_panel: Slide-out side panel (Sheet component from Shadcn). Displays generative AI brief on a selected broker/prospect. Use typewriter effect or staggered fade for the AI text load.
components.data_table: Shadcn Table. Left-aligned text. Generous row padding (py-4). Hover state on rows: bg-gray-50.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-[#CBA135] hover:text-white transition-colors. Secondary: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:border-[#0A0A0A]

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for all icons. Do not use lucide-react unless absolutely necessary.

Install leaflet and react-leaflet for the geographic overview component. Ensure you add Leaflet's CSS. Use a light theme tile layer (e.g., CartoDB Positron: 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png').
Build a main layout with a persistent left Sidebar and a main Dashboard Area.
Implement the Pipeline as a Kanban board using a flex layout with horizontal scrolling. The columns should be: Identifierad, Kontaktad, Möte bokat, Förhandling, Signerad, Onboardad.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, table rows, kanban cards) have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg).
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for automated testing.
The AI Research Prompts feature should be built as a Shadcn Sheet (Slide-out panel) that triggers when clicking 'Generate Brief' on a prospect, presenting a clean, text-heavy AI summary.

Use Shadcn components for complex interactions like Modals, Sheets, and Tabs, but heavily customize them to remove the default 'Vercel look'—adhere strictly to the flat, 1px border, high-contrast monochrome + gold UI.
Ensure strict adherence to the typography rules in the CSS variables. Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Do not default to Inter.
